title: 'Look at what we're living with': Eastwood Heights residents show conditions to the I-Team
summary: Eastwood Heights senior residents are experiencing deteriorating living conditions including water damage, roof leaks, and poor air quality in their Syracuse Housing Authority building. A third iteration of a renovation project has been repeatedly delayed despite promises, with the latest deal pending Common Council vote. Residents express frustration over prolonged suffering and broken commitments from SHA and the city.

political_signal.description: Public media exposure of housing authority failures and repeated project delays creating resident activism and accountability pressure on SHA and Common Council decision-makers

processing_notes: Article date is July 24, 2025 (future date - may indicate test data or publishing error)
No specific dollar amounts mentioned for renovation project scope
Multiple rounds of delays suggest procurement or intergovernmental coordination issues
Newly retired board commissioner speaking publicly indicates potential internal tensions at SHA
Common Council vote expected 'in the coming weeks' - timeline unclear
